===================
===================
=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
2000-09-24
Portsmouth, England
Guildhall

Lineage: trade audio cdr's > eac (secure, offset correct)  wav > flac 8



 Disc 1
========
01 Somebody Touched Me
02 To Ramona (Larry Campbell on mandolin)
03 Visions Of Johanna
04 Mama, You Been On My Mind (Bob Dylan on harp)
05 Tangled Up In Blue 
06 Searching For A Soldier's Grave (Larry Campbell on mandolin)
Electric:
07 Country Pie
08 Can't Wait
09 Gotta Serve Somebody
10 If Not For You
11 The Wicked Messenger (Bob Dylan on harp)
12 Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat

 Disc 2
========
01 Love Sick
02 Like A Rolling Stone
03 Fourth Time Around (acoustic - Larry Campbell on bozouki)
04 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (Larry Campbell on acoustic guitar)
05 Forever Young (acoustic)
06 Highway 61 Revisited
07 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic)

===================
